34A.title: Tenant Foundation与Isolation
34A.theme: Tenant域、层级、上下文、RLS、资源边界与生命周期

34C.title: Workload Identity与Credential Governance
34C.theme: SPIFFE/mTLS、机器身份、Secret Broker、短期凭证、审计与恢复

35A.title: GitHub Cloud／GHES SCM Connector
35A.theme: GitHub App、Repo生命周期、Webhook、分支、PR、凭证与兼容性

36C.title: Runner Execution Operations
36C.theme: Checkpoint、Artifact/Log流、离线队列、站点自治、缓存预热与Fleet运营

38B.title: Policy Intelligence与Governance Engineering
38B.theme: 自然语言到形式化Policy、知识图谱、冲突、Mining、Explainability、Copilot与法规影响

38C.title: Governance Workflow与Regulatory Operations
38C.theme: 义务台账、合规日历、RACI、监管报送、培训、董事会、检查与治理Case

37A.title: Artifact、Provenance 与 Evidence Fabric
37A.theme: 统一 Artifact Schema、内容寻址、签名、SBOM、SLSA、证据图、对象锁、Retention 与离线验收包

37B.title: Evidence Producer Integrations
37B.theme: Jenkins、GitHub Actions、GitLab CI、Azure Pipelines、SonarQube、SCA/SAST、Test、Performance 与第三方审计证据接入

37C.title: Evidence Analytics 与 Assurance Cockpit
37C.theme: 证据完整度、供应链风险、审计就绪度、趋势、异常、到期预警、控制覆盖、Portfolio Assurance 与高管/审计驾驶舱
